subject: [AAI] Update certs to be valid until Jan 2022
commit_message:
[AAI] Update certs to be valid until Jan 2022

Currently updating the sparky and generic
certificates to be valid until jan 2022

Issue-ID: AAI-2841
Change-Id: I2591c8c7c629e5642c9e6c28070c2666542ad4f3
Signed-off-by: Kajur, Harish (vk250x) <vk250x@att.com>
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm2/258

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/260/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/260/ )

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/260/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/260

I can help with automatic retrieval for these certificates and I started on AAI Proxy (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/116385) and AAI resources (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/116386)

Just to be sure the certificate to retrieve:
aai --> "aai.onap" cert
aai-resources --> same?
aai-traversal --> same?
aai-search-data --> which one? how to generate it?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> I can help with automatic retrieval for these certificates and I started on AAI Proxy (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/116385) and AAI resources (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/116386)
> 
> Just to be sure the certificate to retrieve:
> aai --> "aai.onap" cert
> aai-resources --> same?
> aai-traversal --> same?
> aai-search-data --> which one? how to generate it?

@Sylvain, For aai, the cert is aai.onap
For aai-resources, the cert should be aai-resources.onap, if you check the cert details on aai, it has an SAN list entry with aai-resources.onap but since the certificates will be generated per pod, it should target aai-resources.
For aai-traversal, it should be aai-traversal.onap

Search data service is being retired in honolulu and the repo is already to set to read only
